title: Code-knowledge index: file-discovery mechanism
context: The index must scan the source tree respecting .gitignore. Issue #353 says to reuse the batched 'git check-ignore' pattern from src/rule-scripts/runner.ts. Verification found that pattern has NO shared helper (it is duplicated in src/health/checker.ts with a different invocation), and a heavyweight RAG-purpose scanner (RagFileFilter.discoverFiles, used by RagService) already exists. RULE-13/14 require routing shared logic through one canonical helper.

options.label: Extract the check-ignore batch into a small shared helper; use it in the new module AND reroute runner.ts through it
Copy the check-ignore batch into the new module (issue's literal wording; leaves the existing duplication)
Reuse RagFileFilter.discoverFiles (heavyweight; couples the index to RAG ignore-layer config)

rationale: Canonical-helper rule (RULE-13/14): extract the batched check-ignore scan once, reuse in the new module and reroute runner.ts.
